reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención en playa de combustible, lástima que está cerrado el full, es un servicio muy necesario, me extraño mucho, dicen que hace un tiempo largo está cerrado, insisto una pena 😔😔😔

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service at the gas station, it's a shame the full station is closed, it's a very necessary service, I was very surprised, they say it's been closed for a long time, I insist, what a shame 😔😔😔

reviews.comment:
Se ve que está en refacción, de todas maneras buena atención en la carga de combustible

(Translated by Google)
It looks like it's under repair, but the service at the fuel pump was good nonetheless.

reviews.comment:
Siempre fue una de las mejores. Espero el ACA  no se duerma y no perdamos otro lugar emblematico.

(Translated by Google)
It was always one of the best. I hope the ACA doesn't get complacent and we don't lose another iconic place.
